subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! The All-Merciful hath created humankind for the adornment of this contingent world, so that men may array the earth with the manifold blessings… It is clear that learning is the greatest bestowal of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی حضرت رحمن انسانرا بجهت تزیین عالم امکان خلق فرمود تا بانواع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @purpose; goal of creation
